name: harness-engineering
description: Agent-first repository design with progressive disclosure, architecture enforcement, and entropy management for AI agent development.

interface.shortDescription: Agent-first repository design with progressive disclosure, architecture enforcement, and entropy management.
interface.longDescription: Install the Harness Engineering plugin to design and maintain agent-first repositories with progressive disclosure, machine-checkable architecture invariants, documentation entropy control, and autonomous agents that enforce structure, drive end-to-end work, and manage execution plans.
defaultPrompt: Audit this repository for layer-direction violations and structural-test compliance.
Review recent changes for bugs, security issues, and project-convention drift.
Report documentation drift, stale cross-links, and execution-plan freshness across the repo.
Reproduce this bug in an isolated worktree, implement the fix, and validate it with observability evidence.
Write or update the execution plan for this feature under docs/exec-plans/.
